title: The Spider Spirits
content:
Li Ming and his team continued their journey, traveling through forests and mountains. They encountered more demons, but Li Ming was able to defeat them all.

One day, they came to a forest that was filled with spider webs. The webs were so thick that they blocked the path, and there were spiders crawling everywhere.

"What is this place?" Tang Sanzang asked.

Li Ming looked at the map. "This is the Spider Forest," he said. "It's home to the Spider Spirits."

Zhu Bajie's eyes widened. "Spider Spirits? I don't like spiders."

Li Ming smiled. "Don't worry. I'll handle this."

***

Li Ming walked into the forest, his golden staff in hand. The spider webs were thick, but Li Ming was able to cut through them with his staff.

After a few hours, they came to a clearing. In the center of the clearing, there was a large spider web, and sitting in the web were seven beautiful women.

"Welcome," one of the women said. "We are the Spider Spirits."

Li Ming stepped forward. "Spider Spirits, we're on a journey to the west to obtain the scriptures. Let us pass."

The Spider Spirits smiled. "You want to pass? Then you have to answer our riddle."

Li Ming raised an eyebrow. "What riddle?"

The Spider Spirits looked at each other, then one of them spoke.

"I have a thousand legs but cannot walk, a long neck but no head, and a body but no heart. What am I?"

Li Ming thought for a moment. "A spider web."

The Spider Spirits smiled. "Correct."

They stepped aside, allowing Li Ming and his team to pass.

***

As they walked through the forest, Li Ming thought about the riddle. It had been easy, but it had also been a test. The Spider Spirits had wanted to see if Li Ming was clever enough to solve it.

He knew that there would be more tests ahead, but he was ready. He had his team, his golden staff, and his intelligence.

The journey to the west was continuing, and Li Ming was determined to see it through.
